title: QAI’s Ultra-Low Latency Trading: Game Changer for Quant Traders?
author: SnooHedgehogs560
selftext:
QuantixAI recently launched its token $QAI on BingX, and it’s catching attention for its high-frequency trading infrastructure.  
Using models like GARCH, LSTM, and SVM, QAI aims to optimize liquidity while minimizing slippage via ultra-low latency execution.  
Though still early, this Ethereum-based token seems built for serious traders who value algorithmic performance. Watching how it adapts in real market conditions will be key.
